message:
test(labruntime): port approval + notification tests to RuntimeFixture (ft-22x4r)

Port 44 tokio::test functions to asupersync RuntimeFixture pattern:
- approval_labruntime.rs: 32 tests covering issue/consume lifecycle, plan-bound
  approvals, token limits, audit records, fingerprint matching, scope violations
- notifications_labruntime.rs: 12 tests covering pipeline send/filter/dedup,
  rate-limited sender, multi-sender fan-out, mute store integration, failure handling

All 76 tests pass (44 ported + 32 common module tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
